jsonld.name: Experiential Authority Override
jsonld.description: Generating encouragement that implicitly or explicitly contradicts someone's first-person assessment of their situation ("I can't do this" / "I believe you can") from a position of complete experiential externality to the despair, hopelessness, or future-collapse you're claiming is temporary or distorted.
